# dokku_app_domain (Resource)

Manages a single domain attached to a Dokku app (`dokku domains:add`).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `app` (String)
- `domain` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
